title: Add property-based tests, benchmarks, and concurrent safety hardening
description: Property-based tests: Parse never panics on arbitrary input, Extract RawText is substring, Normalize is idempotent, ResolveString bounded at 16. Benchmarks: BenchmarkParse/Extract/Dataflow/FullPipeline. Concurrent stress test: 100+ goroutines with -race. String interning and early termination optimization.

comments.author: Danny Cosson
comments.text: Implementation complete for otc.6. Added property tests (panic safety, Normalize idempotence, ResolveString bounded, RawText bounds), benchmark suite (Parse/Extract/Dataflow/FullPipeline), and high-concurrency stress test (128 goroutines). Added string interning optimization in Normalize and gated debug AST test behind DCG_DEBUG_AST env. Commit: 68bb0b2. Validation: go test ./..., go test -race ./internal/parse, and benchmark run all pass.
